scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.build: npm run install:all && npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.start:backend: cd backend && cross-env NODE_ENV=production node dist/main.js
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run migrate && npm run start:backend
scripts.start:electron: npm run build && npm run migrate && electron .
